entry.title: My name is yours to keep
entry.summary:
Author: Elgcarres

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 95,109Chapters: 42/?Kudos: 161

Summary: ... He doesn't want to hear his name ever again. He might change it. Eddie ruined his name because only Eddie could use his name properly.And he still uses it… properly.***It started as a fix-it story for 'Lab Rats'. It doesn't go well *** What if there's Eddie in the lab What if it's him who dies instead of Bobby. Kinda.

entry.title: And If I Drown, What Then?
entry.summary:
Author: Allypop_84

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,810Chapters: 7/12Kudos: 277

Summary: Post-lawsuit, Buck fights to reclaim his place at the 118. But the team he came back for doesn’t quite feel like home anymore, and the distance between him and Eddie keeps widening. Buck feels himself slowly disappearing - first from the team, then from himself. He's always been good at saving other people. He's never been good at saving himself. Or A Buck and Eddie post-lawsuit fic. ----------- Please heed the tags! This fic explores alcohol and substance abuse and may be triggering for some readers. If these themes are difficult for you, please put yourself first.

entry.title: hands on
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,502Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 186

Summary: The boyfriend looks at Eddie's arm, looks at Eddie's face, does whatever math drunk people do when they're deciding whether a fight is worth it, and somehow arrives at the correct answer. He grabs maybe-horse-Ashley by the elbow and pulls her away, muttering something about firefighters that Buck doesn't catch because he's too busy trying not to pass out. Eddie turns around. His hand is still on Buck's chest. "Seriously?" One eyebrow up. Not angry yet, but getting there. "We've been here an hour." "He came at me!" Buck throws his hands up. Outraged. Innocent. An absolute victim of circumstance and nothing more. "I was just talking to her." "You were practically on top of her." "That's just how I talk to people, Eddie. I'm a leaner. It's my thing." Eddie stares at him for a second. His hand drops from Buck's chest and he shakes his head, turning back to the bar. "Get yourself a drink," Eddie says over his shoulder. "And stay out of trouble for five minutes." He makes it roughly eleven minutes before he does something stupid again. Or,Buck is completely normal about Eddie shoving Blue to defend his honor. Really. He is.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Son You Always Had
entry.summary:
Author: bad_at_everything

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,830Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 67

Summary: “Is everything okay?” Eddie asks, his tone shifting. The background noise crackling through the phone quiets somewhat, till all Buck can really pick out is the muted rubber impacts against concrete and indistinguishable shit-talking. It sounds fun over there. If you’re into basketball. Which Eddie is. “Yeah, it’s fine. Well, no,” Buck says, and he knows that isn’t helpful. He remembers the last and only time he’d gone to one of those games, when he’d very swiftly destroyed both the mood and Eddie’s ankle because he couldn’t handle his own feelings. He wonders when he’ll stop being a lumbering bull in Eddie’s life. “Are you alright?” Eddie asks, slow, like he’s talking to a scared child on a call, “Did something happen?” “I’m fine. It’s just– My mom died.”OR: Margaret Buckley dies. Buck is fine, but Eddie keeps showing up, and Buck really doesn't understand why.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: i have this dream where i am back at the old house
entry.summary:
Author: ebuckleydiazz

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,245Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 37

Summary: He felt a hand on his shoulder and jumped, and gasped. His breathing still wasn’t quite right, like he had just ran one of those marathons but he couldn’t catch it. He couldn’t calm down, and that thought alone felt.. Terrifying. He had pushed himself more against the wall, face buried in his arms now. He could tell he was shaking, but he didn’t really pay that much attention to it. More paying attention trying to breathe, trying not to think about the terribly, shitty thing that happened to him. or; post 9x13 what if after bucks kidnapped.

entry.title: Mother's Boy (Pick Your Poison)
entry.summary:
Author: cleartheeyre

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,012Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 16

Summary: Eddie hadn’t meant for this to happen, they had just gotten past whatever weird quiet phase they had been since Eddie flew Chris in to stand in place of a hard conversation. The thing is, Eddie didn’t anticipate that he would be able to keep Chris firmly placed in between him and Buck ever having any serious conversation for this long. It wasn’t like Buck to let things go easily, so when Buck didn’t bring up the argument again, Eddie took it as a win. Which is why he really, really, really didn’t mean to mess up the peaceful coexistence they had going on. Buck had just– Well. Buck hadn’t really done anything. Eddie is willing to take the blame here. (or, buck and eddie share a bed in a creepy motel room mid roadtrip home. they get to talking about the stuff they've been avoiding. after their car flips over on the way out of arizona, eddie wakes up in the hospital room to find buck missing.)

entry.title: slammed the door on my whole world
entry.summary:
Author: perfectlysunny

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,362Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 134

Summary: He knows he shouldn’t be here, this isn’t what they do anymore, he ruined this, but he can’t help it. He’s always been selfish when it comes to Buck anyway. He knocks softly and it’s almost magical to him how Buck appears.“Sorry, we don’t want to buy- Eddie?”“Hey Buck,” Eddie says. “Look I know you don’t want me to be here, but I just- I just wanted to give you this.”He holds out the casserole, and Buck takes it almost mechanically. He knows Buck is thinking about the last time they were in this position. He knows he’s thinking of wrapped wrists and red eyes. He knows he’s thinking of the sharp intake of breath and the loud click of the door, and no words spoken between them. He knows he’s thinking about it, because he is too. It’s out and too loud in the small space between them.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Dorm Room 118
entry.summary:
Author: loving-you-is-payneful (LightFairy)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,762Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 15

Summary: When Buck moves into Dorm Room 118, he’s hoping college will finally give him the fresh start he’s been craving. Instead, he finds himself drawn to his quiet, guarded roommate, Eddie. Over the course of their college years these two find out that family is not just the people that you were born into. It’s also the people you choose along the way.

entry.summary:

entry.title: Never thought I’d have it this good (So why’s it feel so bad?)
entry.summary:
Author: JamieNimbus

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,508Chapters: 17/19Kudos: 40

Summary: 𝘈𝘵 𝘰𝘯𝘭𝘺 17 𝘺𝘦𝘢𝘳𝘴 𝘰𝘭𝘥, 𝘢 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘯𝘨 𝘌𝘥𝘮𝘶𝘯𝘥𝘰 𝘋𝘪𝘢𝘻 𝘩𝘢𝘥 𝘣𝘦𝘦𝘯 𝘤𝘢𝘴𝘵 𝘪𝘯 𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘧𝘪𝘳𝘴𝘵 𝘴𝘩𝘰𝘸, ‘𝘔𝘢𝘯𝘵𝘦𝘯𝘵𝘦 𝘧𝘪𝘳𝘮𝘦, 𝘴𝘰𝘭𝘥𝘢𝘥𝘰’. 𝘈 𝘴𝘩𝘰𝘸 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘩𝘢𝘥 𝘣𝘦𝘦𝘯 𝘳𝘦𝘸𝘳𝘪𝘵𝘵𝘦𝘯 𝘰𝘯𝘤𝘦 𝘩𝘦'𝘥 𝘣𝘦𝘦𝘯 𝘤𝘢𝘴𝘵, 𝘮𝘢𝘬𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘴𝘮𝘢𝘭𝘭 𝘣𝘢𝘤𝘬𝘨𝘳𝘰𝘶𝘯𝘥 𝘤𝘩𝘢𝘳𝘢𝘤𝘵𝘦𝘳 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘮𝘢𝘪𝘯 𝘧𝘰𝘤𝘶𝘴 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘴𝘩𝘰𝘸 𝘪𝘯𝘴𝘵𝘦𝘢𝘥, 𝘥𝘶𝘦 𝘵𝘰 𝘩𝘰𝘸 𝘮𝘶𝘤𝘩 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘥𝘪𝘳𝘦𝘤𝘵𝘰𝘳 𝘩𝘢𝘥 𝘵𝘢𝘬𝘦𝘯 𝘢 𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘵𝘰 𝘩𝘪𝘮. 𝘏𝘪𝘴 𝘤𝘢𝘳𝘦𝘦𝘳, 𝘵𝘩𝘰𝘶𝘨𝘩 𝘨𝘳𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘩𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘭𝘺 𝘣𝘦𝘭𝘰𝘷𝘦𝘥 𝘣𝘺 𝘢𝘭𝘭 𝘸𝘩𝘰 𝘸𝘢𝘵𝘤𝘩𝘦𝘥, 𝘩𝘢𝘥 𝘣𝘦𝘦𝘯 𝘰𝘯𝘦 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘴𝘩𝘰𝘳𝘵𝘦𝘴𝘵 𝘰𝘧 𝘢𝘯𝘺 𝘴𝘵𝘢𝘳 𝘰𝘶𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘳𝘦- 𝘢𝘵 20 𝘺𝘦𝘢𝘳𝘴 𝘰𝘭𝘥 𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘵𝘪𝘮𝘦 𝘰𝘯 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘴𝘤𝘳𝘦𝘦𝘯 𝘤𝘢𝘮𝘦 𝘵𝘰 𝘢 𝘤𝘭𝘰𝘴𝘦. 𝘈𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘵𝘪𝘮𝘦 𝘧𝘢𝘯𝘴 𝘵𝘩𝘰𝘶𝘨𝘩𝘵 𝘪𝘵 𝘸𝘢𝘴 𝘫𝘶𝘴𝘵 𝘢𝘯𝘰𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘳 𝘰𝘯𝘦 𝘰𝘧 𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘪𝘮𝘱𝘶𝘭𝘴𝘪𝘷𝘦 𝘥𝘦𝘤𝘪𝘴𝘪𝘰𝘯𝘴, 𝘧𝘶𝘦𝘭𝘭𝘦𝘥 𝘣𝘺 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘳𝘪𝘴𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘳𝘶𝘮𝘰𝘶𝘳𝘴 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘴𝘤𝘢𝘯𝘥𝘢𝘭, 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘩𝘦'𝘥 𝘥𝘦𝘤𝘪𝘥𝘦𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘳𝘦𝘵𝘪𝘳𝘦. 𝘉𝘶𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘺 𝘥𝘪𝘥𝘯'𝘵 𝘬𝘯𝘰𝘸 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘵𝘳𝘶𝘵𝘩. 𝘛𝘩𝘦𝘺 𝘥𝘪𝘥𝘯'𝘵 𝘬𝘯𝘰𝘸 𝘌𝘥𝘥𝘪𝘦.

entry.title: The Buck Effect
entry.summary:
Author: Fictionwriter

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,083Chapters: 2/7Kudos: 3

Summary: Science has said that one singular event can ultimately result in later much larger consequences. Eddie Diaz discovers the truth of this when he meets Evan (Buck) Buckley, and the trajectory of his life changes forever. It’s 1920 and the Great War has ended. Eddie Diaz, with his son Christopher, make the decision to move from Texas to the growing metropolis of Los Angeles. Former Army medic Eddie has a new job, a new career and, he hopes, a new direction.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Now, The Then, The Thinking Of When
entry.summary:
Author: stolen_pen_name23

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 759Chapters: 1/15Kudos: 16

Summary: “Just rest now,” Bobby says. His voice retains the authority of a commanding officer — the tone that Eddie has been drilled to obey since he was seventeen. But behind it is something else. Something with more worry, more anguish. “Wait,” Eddie says. Memories hide behind frosted glass in his mind. Something is missing, something important. His eyes sweep the room, searching every corner for the one person who isn’t there. The question breaks through the frosted glass. “Bobby, where is he?” “Eddie…” Bobby says slowly. “We can talk about it later when you’re feeling better.” “Bobby,” Eddie says, slow and calm despite the panic racing through his veins. “I need to know.” Or: An AU where Doug kidnaps Buck to get to Maddie

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Lose the Lead
entry.summary:
Author: captain_wolf

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,208Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: Buck feels like he’s vibrating out of his skin. Smoothing his palms over his thighs seems to be enough to reassure himself he’s not actually vibrating. The Jeep’s engine has been off for a few minutes now, but Buck thinks he can still feel the rumble coming from it. He really doesn’t want anything to go wrong for his first shift back post-lightning. But. Here he is with superpowers. He’d like to say it came out of nowhere, but Buck can think of one recent event in his life that could explain this new ability to move faster than the speed of light. - Buck dies and comes back, not wrong, but different. And of course, he can't even deal with sudden superpowers in peace because someone's trying to disrupt his life in a brand new way.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: somewhere between love and abuse
entry.summary:
Author: literalmetaphor

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,811Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 192

Summary: “Eddie,” Buck tries. “You could, uh… I get why you asked for two rooms, but maybe we should…” The bed is small. They’d be touching all night, and that would be bad, given what happened last night—it would be terrible; Buck definitely doesn’t want it. He doesn’t want Eddie pressed against his chest, doesn’t want his soft, steady breath at his ear. He doesn’t want it so bad that he says, “Splitting up gets people killed in horror movies.” Eddie’s answering smile is surprisingly soft. “We’re not in a horror movie, Buck.” ~ They're in a horror movie. 9x13 alternate version.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Trying to Catch Your Heart
entry.summary:
Author: ForOurMoony

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,554Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 73

Summary: In the wake of so much change it's inevitable that the dynamic between Buck and Eddie has transformed into something different. While they are blind to it everyone else is noticing the way they have fallen into a rhythm that looks a lot less like "best friends" and a lot more like a relationship. It takes overly invested friends, a very observant sister, and a lot of tequila for them to finally stop pretending that their "normal" is what everyone else calls falling in love   Or: Buck and Eddie are oblivious idiots and everyone else is getting tired of pretending they can't see exactly what's going on.
